title: RunFabric Resource Definition
description: Definition for one entry under runfabric.yml resources.<name>.

envVar.description: Environment variable injected into function env (e.g. DATABASE_URL).

connectionStringEnv.description: Environment variable name to read at deploy time.

connectionString.description: Literal or ${env:VAR} expression resolved at deploy.

provision.description: When true, provider provisioner may resolve connection details (fallback to connectionStringEnv/connectionString).

identifier.description: Provider-specific resource identifier used by provisioning (e.g. RDS instance ID).

region.description: Optional provider region override for provisioning.

engine.description: Optional database engine hint used by provisioning.

userEnv.description: Env var name for DB user when provisioning.

passwordEnv.description: Env var name for DB password when provisioning.

dbNameEnv.description: Env var name for DB name when provisioning.
